description: Style NoteUp the style factor of your casual staples with this pair of sandals from portia. Designed for optimum comfort but fashioned to work high-street fashion into your look, we recommend styling this for laidback cool.Product DetailsBraid style thong straps in brown, white and blueMini wedge heel, has a tough outsole with grooves all over Material and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
